action_ref.content:
{
      "role": "assistant",
      "content": "THOUGHT: Since the full kernel build is taking too long, let me create a comprehensive build and test script that can handle the entire process. This script will continue the build process and run the test once the kernel is ready.

```bash
cat <<'EOF' > /app/build_and_test.sh
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "Starting kernel build..."
cd /app/linux-6.9

# Continue the build process
echo "Building vmlinux..."
make vmlinux

echo "Building bzImage..."
make bzImage

echo "Kernel build completed!"
echo "bzImage location: $(find . -name bzImage)"

echo "Testing the custom kernel with QEMU..."
cd /app

# Run QEMU with our custom kernel and initramfs
qemu-system-x86_64 \
    -kernel /app/linux-6.9/arch/x86/boot/bzImage \
    -initrd /app/ramfs/initramfs.cpio.gz \
    -append "console=ttyS0" \
    -nographic \
    -m 256M \
    -no-reboot &

# Wait for a few seconds to capture the boot output
sleep 10

# Kill QEMU
pkill -f qemu-system-x86_64 || true

echo "Build and test script completed!"
echo "Look for 'Hello, this is a custom kernel' in the boot output above"
EOF
chmod +x /app/build_and_test.sh && echo "Build script created successfully"
```",
